body:
Hi sweetheart, I'm doing a pot roast Sunday after service and your Uncle Raymond is coming by around 2. Keisha said she and the kids might come too. Can you make it? Bring your appetite, I'm making the mac and cheese you like.

Love you, Mama
snippet: Hi sweetheart, I'm doing a pot roast Sunday after service and your Uncle Raym...
subject: Sunday dinner this week

body:
Mama, I'll be there. I've got the long run Saturday and then choir is on for Sunday since it's the third Sunday, so I'll head straight over after service. Tell Uncle Ray I said save me a seat. I'll bring some sweet tea from Publix.

Shannon
snippet: Mama, I'll be there. I've got the long run Saturday and then choir is on for...
subject: Re: Sunday dinner this week

body:
Coach, sending over the proposed lineup for the Crestwood Cross Country Invitational at Oak Mountain on the 24th. I have Trey, Isaiah, and Jordan in the varsity boys race and Devon anchoring. Bus leaves the school at 6:45 AM. Can you confirm the JV entries by Wednesday so I can submit to the host?

Demetrius
snippet: Coach, sending over the proposed lineup for the Crestwood Cross Country Invit...
subject: XC Invitational lineup - Oct 24

body:
Looks good. Move Marcus Reed up to varsity, he's been closing his last 800 strong all week. Keep Devon at anchor. I'll confirm the JV list at practice tomorrow and get it to you by Wednesday morning. I'll ride the bus with the team. Thanks for getting ahead of this.

Coach Perry
snippet: Looks good. Move Marcus Reed up to varsity, he's been closing his last 800 st...
subject: Re: XC Invitational lineup - Oct 24

body:
Coach Perry, I just wanted to thank you for the extra time you've been putting in with Trey on his starts. He came home Tuesday talking about the drills you ran and he was actually excited about practice for once. It means a lot to me as his mom. Whatever you're doing, it's working.

Yolanda Dawson
snippet: Coach Perry, I just wanted to thank you for the extra time you've been puttin...
subject: Thank you for working with Trey

body:
Ms. Dawson, thank you for the kind note. Trey has real talent and, more importantly, he listens and works. He's been holding his drive phase a lot longer than he was a month ago. Keep encouraging him to get his sleep and eat before practice and he'll keep climbing. Proud of him.

Coach Perry
snippet: Ms. Dawson, thank you for the kind note. Trey has real talent and, more impor...
subject: Re: Thank you for working with Trey

body:
Brother Shannon, Eddie wants the men's choir to lead two selections on first Sunday next month. He's thinking 'Total Praise' and something up-tempo to close. Can you make the 9 AM rehearsal that morning? We could use your voice on the bottom. Let me know.

Pastor Hayes
snippet: Brother Shannon, Eddie wants the men's choir to lead two selections on first...
subject: Men's choir - first Sunday selection

body:
Pastor, I'll be there at 9 sharp. 'Total Praise' is always right. Tell Eddie I'm good on the bass part, just send me the key he wants to take it in so I can run through it Saturday after my long run. Looking forward to it.

Shannon
snippet: Pastor, I'll be there at 9 sharp. 'Total Praise' is always right. Tell Eddie...
subject: Re: Men's choir - first Sunday selection

body:
Shannon, I booked a new sports PT eval for Wednesday at 8 AM. Patient is Roderick James, referred by Dr. Lawson for a hamstring strain, runner. He filled out the intake form already, I put it in your folder. Your 11:15 rescheduled to Thursday. Let me know if the morning gets too tight.

Monica
snippet: Shannon, I booked a new sports PT eval for Wednesday at 8 AM. Patient is Rode...
subject: New patient eval - Wednesday 8 AM

body:
Thanks Monica. Wednesday at 8 is fine. Pull his referral notes from Dr. Lawson and print the intake so I can review before he comes back. If he's a runner I'll want to look at his gait, so block me an extra fifteen minutes if you can. Appreciate you.

Shannon
snippet: Thanks Monica. Wednesday at 8 is fine. Pull his referral notes from Dr. Lawso...
subject: Re: New patient eval - Wednesday 8 AM

body:
Shannon, for the Iron City charity 5K on Saturday the 8th I'd like us to staff a recovery and stretch booth at the finish. Can you lead it? I'll have Brittany and Kevin help with the tables. We're donating proceeds to the youth sports fund this year. Bus down to the start is at 6:30.

Dr. Lawson
snippet: Shannon, for the Iron City charity 5K on Saturday the 8th I'd like us to staf...
subject: Charity 5K - clinic booth Nov 8

body:
Happy to lead the booth. I'll bring the foam rollers and the bands from the gym and put together a quick post-race stretch flow. If Brittany and Kevin can handle the tables I'll run the stretch line. I'll be running the 5K first, then straight to the booth. Good cause.

Shannon
snippet: Happy to lead the booth. I'll bring the foam rollers and the bands from the g...
subject: Re: Charity 5K - clinic booth Nov 8

body:
Coach Perry, this is Coach Wendell Pope with Auburn track. We've had eyes on Devon Mitchell since the regional meet and we're very interested. I'd like to set up a call this week to talk through his timeline and a possible unofficial visit. What times work for you? My cell is 205-555-0412.

Coach Pope
snippet: Coach Perry, this is Coach Wendell Pope with Auburn track. We've had eyes on...
subject: Devon Mitchell - Auburn interest

body:
Coach Pope, glad to hear from you, Devon has worked hard for this. I can talk Thursday after 6 PM. I'm cc'ing Devon so he's in the loop. We're already planning an unofficial visit window in early December, so let's see if the timing lines up. Talk soon.

Coach Perry
snippet: Coach Pope, glad to hear from you, Devon has worked hard for this. I can talk...
subject: Re: Devon Mitchell - Auburn interest

body: Coach, my mom said it's ok for the visit December 5th. I'm kind of nervous but excited. What should I wear and do I need to bring anything? Thank you for setting all this up. I wouldn't be here without you for real.
snippet: Coach, my mom said it's ok for the visit December 5th. I'm kind of nervous bu...
subject: Visit on the 5th

body:
Devon, you've earned every bit of this, so walk in with your head up. Wear something clean and neat, a collared shirt is plenty. Bring your transcript copy and your meet times printed out. I'll pick you up at 7 AM, we'll grab breakfast on the way. Just be yourself and ask questions. Proud of you.

Coach Perry
snippet: Devon, you've earned every bit of this, so walk in with your head up. Wear so...
subject: Re: Visit on the 5th

body: Hey big bro, Mama wants everybody at her place Thanksgiving by 1. Marcus is frying the turkey this year so don't let him forget the thermometer like last time lol. Can you bring the greens and pick up Uncle Ray on your way? Jaylen and Nia keep asking if Uncle Shannon is coming.
snippet: Hey big bro, Mama wants everybody at her place Thanksgiving by 1. Marcus is f...
subject: Thanksgiving at Mama's

body:
I'm there. I'll do the collards Wednesday night so they're ready, and I'll swing by Ensley and grab Uncle Ray on my way over. Tell Jaylen and Nia I'm bringing the good cornbread. Marcus, brother, please watch that oil this year. See y'all at 1.

Shannon
snippet: I'm there. I'll do the collards Wednesday night so they're ready, and I'll sw...
subject: Re: Thanksgiving at Mama's

body:
Mr. Perry, this confirms your annual physical and cardiac screening with Dr. Marcus Grant at UAB Sports Medicine on Saturday, November 15 at 9:00 AM. Please fast for 8 hours beforehand for bloodwork and bring your current medication list. Reply or call 205-555-0388 to reschedule.

UAB Sports Medicine
snippet: Mr. Perry, this confirms your annual physical and cardiac screening with Dr....
subject: Appointment confirmation - Nov 15

body:
Confirmed, I'll be there at 9 and I'll fast that morning. No medication changes since last year, still just the daily allergy tablet. I'll bring my running log too in case Dr. Grant wants to see the mileage going into marathon training. Thank you.

Shannon Perry
snippet: Confirmed, I'll be there at 9 and I'll fast that morning. No medication chang...
subject: Re: Appointment confirmation - Nov 15

body: Coach, the season opener is set for February 13 at the CrossPlex. Athletic director needs our entry list and transportation request by the end of January. I started the heat sheet. Also, the new blocks came in but two are missing pedal screws. Want me to order replacements on the clinic account or the school's?
snippet: Coach, the season opener is set for February 13 at the CrossPlex. Athletic di...
subject: Season opener Feb 13 - facility request

body:
Use the school account for the block screws, keep the clinic out of it. I'll finalize the entry list at practice Friday so we hit the January deadline. CrossPlex is a good draw for the kids, let's get there early to warm up properly. Send me the heat sheet draft tonight if you can.

Coach Perry
snippet: Use the school account for the block screws, keep the clinic out of it. I'll...
subject: Re: Season opener Feb 13 - facility request

body:
Shannon Perry, your registration for the Mercedes-Benz Half Marathon on Sunday, February 7, 2027 in downtown Birmingham is confirmed. Bib pickup is at the Expo on February 5-6 at Boutwell Auditorium. Your corral assignment will be emailed the week of the race. Good luck and train smart.

Mercedes-Benz Marathon
snippet: Shannon Perry, your registration for the Mercedes-Benz Half Marathon on Sunda...
subject: You're registered - Mercedes-Benz Half Marathon

body:
Thank you, registration confirmed on my end. I'll pick up my bib at the expo Friday the 5th after the clinic. Looking forward to running my home roads. Please add me to the pace-group updates if you have a 1:35 group.

Shannon Perry
snippet: Thank you, registration confirmed on my end. I'll pick up my bib at the expo...
subject: Re: You're registered - Mercedes-Benz Half Marathon

body:
Nephew, I'll meet you and your mama at Greenwood Memorial Saturday morning around 10 for your daddy. I'm bringing the white roses he liked. Three years now. He'd be proud of the man you turned into, coaching those kids and all. We'll have dinner at Brenda's after. Drive safe.

Uncle Ray
snippet: Nephew, I'll meet you and your mama at Greenwood Memorial Saturday morning ar...
subject: Saturday at the cemetery

body:
I'll be there at 10, Uncle Ray. I'll bring a wreath from me and Mama can ride with me. It's hard every year but I'm glad we go together. Means a lot that you keep the roses going. We'll eat at Mama's after and just be together. See you Saturday.

Shannon
snippet: I'll be there at 10, Uncle Ray. I'll bring a wreath from me and Mama can ride...
subject: Re: Saturday at the cemetery

body:
Shannon, saw the Crestwood XC results in the AL.com roundup, congrats to your boys. Devon's name jumped out. I always knew you'd be a great coach. Hope the clinic and your mom are doing well. No need for a long reply, just wanted to say I'm proud of what you're building. Take care.

Jasmine
snippet: Shannon, saw the Crestwood XC results in the AL.com roundup, congrats to your...
subject: Saw your team in the paper

body:
Hey Jasmine, thank you, that means a lot coming from you. The kids ran their hearts out. Devon's got a real shot at D1. Clinic's busy and Mama's doing well, thanks for asking. Hope the floor at Children's isn't running you too ragged. Take care of yourself.

Shannon
snippet: Hey Jasmine, thank you, that means a lot coming from you. The kids ran their...
subject: Re: Saw your team in the paper

body:
Hi Shannon, your registration for the Iron City Sports Medicine Charity 5K on Saturday, November 8, 2026 at Railroad Park is confirmed. Packet pickup opens at 6:30 AM, race starts at 8:00 AM. Your entry supports the Birmingham youth sports fund. Show this email or your QR code at check-in.

Eventbrite
snippet: Hi Shannon, your registration for the Iron City Sports Medicine Charity 5K on...
subject: Your ticket - Iron City Sports Medicine Charity 5K

body:
Hello Shannon, your order of Brooks Ghost 16 running shoes (men's 11) has shipped and will arrive Thursday by 9 PM to 811 Maple Street, Birmingham, AL 35213. Track your package in Your Orders. Thank you for shopping with us.

Amazon
snippet: Hello Shannon, your order of Brooks Ghost 16 running shoes (men's 11) has shi...
subject: Your Amazon order has shipped

body:
Hi Shannon, this is Greg Pemberton, your Tuesday afternoon patient. The knee's been a lot better since we changed the loading drills, thank you. Quick question, am I cleared to start jogging again or should I keep it to the bike one more week? Don't want to set myself back.

Greg
snippet: Hi Shannon, this is Greg Pemberton, your Tuesday afternoon patient. The knee'...
subject: Knee feels better - quick question

body:
Greg, glad to hear it's settling down. Let's do one more week mostly on the bike, then we'll add short walk-jog intervals at your Tuesday session and see how the knee responds. No hills yet. If you get any sharp pain or swelling, stop and email me. You're trending the right way.

Shannon
snippet: Greg, glad to hear it's settling down. Let's do one more week mostly on the b...
subject: Re: Knee feels better - quick question

body:
Coach Perry, it was a pleasure hosting you and Devon on Saturday. The staff was very impressed with his maturity and his 60-meter times. We'll be in touch about next steps after the holidays. Tell Devon to keep his grades up and keep training. Safe travels home.

Coach Pope
snippet: Coach Perry, it was a pleasure hosting you and Devon on Saturday. The staff w...
subject: Great having Devon on campus

body:
Coach Pope, thank you for the hospitality, the visit meant the world to Devon and his family. He hasn't stopped talking about it. His grades are solid and he'll be in the weight room over break. We'll look forward to hearing from you in January. Appreciate everything.

Coach Perry
snippet: Coach Pope, thank you for the hospitality, the visit meant the world to Devon...
subject: Re: Great having Devon on campus

body:
Happy almost birthday my baby! I'm cooking your favorites on the 14th, oxtails and that yellow cake. Keisha and the kids are coming and I invited Uncle Ray. What time can you get here after church? 32 years old, Lord, where does the time go. Love you more than anything.

Mama
snippet: Happy almost birthday my baby! I'm cooking your favorites on the 14th, oxtail...
subject: Your birthday dinner

body:
Mama, you're going to spoil me with those oxtails. I can be there by 1:30, choir runs a little long that Sunday. You don't have to make a fuss but I won't say no to the yellow cake. Thank you for always doing this. Love you. Tell Keisha to bring the kids' appetite.

Shannon
snippet: Mama, you're going to spoil me with those oxtails. I can be there by 1:30, ch...
subject: Re: Your birthday dinner

body:
Brother Shannon, Watch Night on December 31 starts at 10 PM going into the New Year. Deacon Walter is short on ushers and the men's choir is singing at 11. Can you usher the side doors and then join the choir for the midnight selection? Brunch at Sister Brenda's on New Year's Day as always.

Pastor Hayes
snippet: Brother Shannon, Watch Night on December 31 starts at 10 PM going into the Ne...
subject: Watch Night service - need ushers

body:
Pastor, count me in for the side doors and the midnight selection. I'll get there by 9:30 to help Deacon Walter set up the aisles. Bringing the New Year in at New Hope is the best way to start. And yes, I'll be at Mama's brunch the next day. Blessings.

Shannon
snippet: Pastor, count me in for the side doors and the midnight selection. I'll get t...
subject: Re: Watch Night service - need ushers

body: Shannon, New Hope is walking in the MLK Day commemoration downtown on January 15, meeting at Kelly Ingram Park at 9 AM. We'd love some of the young men and your track kids to join us. Pastor's saying a word at the unity breakfast after. Can you help organize the youth who want to come?
snippet: Shannon, New Hope is walking in the MLK Day commemoration downtown on January...
subject: MLK commemoration march - Jan 15

body:
Deacon Walter, I'll be there and I'll bring whichever of the team can make it, this is exactly the kind of thing I want them to be part of. I'll send a note to the parents this week. Kelly Ingram at 9, got it. It's an honor to walk those streets. See you the 15th.

Shannon
snippet: Deacon Walter, I'll be there and I'll bring whichever of the team can make it...
subject: Re: MLK commemoration march - Jan 15

body:
Dear Shannon Perry, your Community First Bank monthly statement for December is now available in online banking. Your auto-payment of $380 toward your student loan posted on the 1st, and your scheduled transfer to savings completed. Log in to review your balances and activity.

Community First Bank

subject: Your monthly statement is ready

body:
D, I'm doing 11 miles Saturday at 7 from the Crestwood loop out toward Lake Purdy to get ready for the half on the 7th. You in if your knee's good? Easy pace, we can talk through the relay order for the opener while we run. Coffee after at the spot. Let me know.

Shannon
snippet: D, I'm doing 11 miles Saturday at 7 from the Crestwood loop out toward Lake P...
subject: Saturday long run before the half

body:
I'm in, knee's been good since I backed off the speed work. 7 AM at the loop. I'll bring gels. Toward Lake Purdy works, those rollers are good marathon prep. We can lock the relay order and I'll bring the new kid's split times. See you Saturday, don't be late.

Demetrius
snippet: I'm in, knee's been good since I backed off the speed work. 7 AM at the loop....
subject: Re: Saturday long run before the half

body:
Shannon, for Christmas morning service the choir is doing 'Go Tell It on the Mountain' and 'O Holy Night' to close. I need the bass section solid at the 9 AM warm-up since service is at 9:30. You good to anchor the bottom? It's a short program, folks want to get home to their families.

Eddie
snippet: Shannon, for Christmas morning service the choir is doing 'Go Tell It on the...
subject: Christmas morning selection

body:
Eddie, I'm there at 9 for warm-up. 'O Holy Night' to close on Christmas, can't beat it. Send me the bass line if you tweaked anything from last year. I'll head to Mama's for dinner right after. Merry Christmas, brother, see you at the warm-up.

Shannon
snippet: Eddie, I'm there at 9 for warm-up. 'O Holy Night' to close on Christmas, can'...
subject: Re: Christmas morning selection
